# Design Showcase Website Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (if subagents available) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Build a static Astro 4 website showcasing 59 DESIGN.md brand design systems with a searchable/filterable gallery, brand detail modal, and monthly screenshot refresh CI.

**Architecture:** Single-page Astro static site. Brand data lives in `src/data/brands.ts`, auto-generated by a helper script that fetches from getdesign.md. Gallery filter and modal are client-side JS islands. Screenshots committed to repo, refreshed monthly via GitHub Actions using sharp + pixelmatch perceptual diffing.

**Tech Stack:** Astro 4, TypeScript (strict), Tailwind CSS v3, Playwright, sharp, pixelmatch, GitHub Actions

---

## File Map

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `astro.config.mjs` | Astro config: static output, Tailwind integration |
| `tailwind.config.mjs` | Dark theme palette, custom spacing |
| `tsconfig.json` | Strict TypeScript |
| `src/types.ts` | `Brand`, `Category`, `CATEGORY_LABELS` — single source of type truth |
| `src/data/brands.ts` | 59 brand entries (generated, then committed) |
| `src/pages/index.astro` | Single page — imports all components |
| `src/components/Nav.astro` | Sticky nav bar |
| `src/components/Hero.astro` | Headline + how-to strip |
| `src/components/Gallery.astro` | Tabs + search + card grid (static render + JS island) |
| `src/components/BrandCard.astro` | Single brand card (screenshot + info) |
| `src/components/BrandModal.astro` | Detail modal (dialog element + tokens + copy button) |
| `src/components/Toast.astro` | Reusable bottom-center toast |
| `public/screenshots/` | Brand screenshots, one `{id}.webp` per brand |
| `scripts/generate-brands-data.ts` | Fetch + parse DESIGN.md files → emit `brands.ts` |
| `scripts/capture-screenshots.ts` | Playwright: screenshot all brand websites → `public/screenshots/` |
| `scripts/diff-screenshots.ts` | sharp + pixelmatch: compare prev vs new, output changed IDs as JSON |
| `.github/workflows/update-screenshots.yml` | Monthly CI: capture → diff → commit → issue |

### Task 1: Initialize Astro project


Expected: `NONE` (fresh repo, no existing Node project)

- [ ] **Step 1.2: Initialize Astro with minimal template**

```bash

```

Accept all prompts. Expected: Astro scaffold created, `node_modules/` installed.

- [ ] **Step 1.3: Add Tailwind CSS integration**


- [ ] **Step 1.4: Install script dependencies**

```bash

npx playwright install chromium
```

- [ ] **Step 1.5: Configure `astro.config.mjs` for static output**

Replace the content of `astro.config.mjs` with:

```js
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
import tailwind from '@astrojs/tailwind';

export default defineConfig({
  output: 'static',
  integrations: [tailwind()],
});
```

- [ ] **Step 1.6: Configure `tailwind.config.mjs`**

```js
/** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */
export default {
  content: ['./src/**/*.{astro,html,js,jsx,md,mdx,svelte,ts,tsx,vue}'],
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        brand: {
          green: '#10b981',
          'green-dim': 'rgba(16,185,129,0.12)',
        },
      },
    },
  },
  plugins: [],
};
```

- [ ] **Step 1.7: Add npm scripts to `package.json`**

Merge these into the `scripts` section of `package.json`:

```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "astro dev",
    "build": "astro build",
    "preview": "astro preview",
    "check": "astro check",
    "screenshots": "tsx scripts/capture-screenshots.ts",
    "screenshots:diff": "tsx scripts/diff-screenshots.ts",
    "gen:brands": "tsx scripts/generate-brands-data.ts"
  }
}
```

```bash
cd /Users/admin/CC-projects/0_awesome-design-md
npm run dev &
sleep 3
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4321
kill %1
```

Expected: `200`


### Task 2: Define types

**Files:**
- Create: `src/types.ts`

- [ ] **Step 2.1: Write `src/types.ts`**

```ts
export type Category =
  | 'ai-ml'
  | 'developer-tools'
  | 'infrastructure'
  | 'design-productivity'
  | 'fintech'
  | 'automotive'
  | 'enterprise'

export const CATEGORY_LABELS: Record<Category | 'all', string> = {
  all:                   'All',
  'ai-ml':               'AI & ML',
  'developer-tools':     'Developer Tools',
  'infrastructure':      'Infrastructure',
  'design-productivity': 'Design & Productivity',
  'fintech':             'Fintech',
  'automotive':          'Automotive',
  'enterprise':          'Enterprise',
}

export const CATEGORIES = Object.keys(CATEGORY_LABELS) as (Category | 'all')[]

export type ColorToken = {
  name: string   // e.g. "Ferrari Red"
  hex: string    // e.g. "#CC0000"
}

export type Brand = {
  id: string              // [a-z0-9.-] — matches public/screenshots/{id}.webp
  name: string
  category: Category
  tagline: string
  websiteUrl: string
  previewUrl: string      // HTML design system preview page
  rawMdUrl: string        // Raw text DESIGN.md URL (text/plain + CORS required)
  tokens: {
    colors: ColorToken[]  // 3–5 entries; [0] is primary accent
    fontFamily: string    // e.g. "Inter, sans-serif"
    borderRadius: string  // Tailwind class: "rounded-none" | "rounded-md" | "rounded-full"
    buttonStyle: string   // Human-readable: "square uppercase" | "rounded soft"
  }
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2.2: Run type check**

```bash
cd /Users/admin/CC-projects/0_awesome-design-md
npm run check
```

Expected: 0 errors

- [ ] **Step 2.3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/types.ts
git commit -m "feat: define Brand and Category types"
```

- [ ] **Step 4.1: Write `scripts/generate-brands-data.ts`**

```ts
/**
 * Fetches DESIGN.md for each brand, extracts tokens, emits src/data/brands.ts
 * Run: npm run gen:brands
 */
import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'fs'
import { join, dirname } from 'path'
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'
import type { Brand, Category } from '../src/types.ts'

const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
const ROOT = join(__dirname, '..')

// ── Brand list extracted from README.md ─────────────────────────────────────
// Format: [id, name, category, tagline, websiteUrl]
const BRAND_LIST: [string, string, Category, string, string][] = [
  // AI & ML
  ['claude',       'Claude',       'ai-ml',               'Warm terracotta accent, clean editorial layout',                       'https://claude.ai'],
  ['cohere',       'Cohere',       'ai-ml',               'Enterprise AI platform. Vibrant gradients, data-rich dashboard',       'https://cohere.com'],
  ['elevenlabs',   'ElevenLabs',   'ai-ml',               'AI voice platform. Dark cinematic UI, audio-waveform aesthetics',      'https://elevenlabs.io'],
  ['minimax',      'Minimax',      'ai-ml',               'Bold dark interface with neon accents',                                'https://www.minimaxi.com'],
  ['mistral.ai',   'Mistral AI',   'ai-ml',               'French-engineered minimalism, purple-toned',                           'https://mistral.ai'],
  ['ollama',       'Ollama',       'ai-ml',               'Terminal-first, monochrome simplicity',                                'https://ollama.com'],
  ['opencode.ai',  'OpenCode AI',  'ai-ml',               'Developer-centric dark theme',                                         'https://opencode.ai'],
  ['replicate',    'Replicate',    'ai-ml',               'Clean white canvas, code-forward',                                     'https://replicate.com'],
  ['runwayml',     'RunwayML',     'ai-ml',               'Cinematic dark UI, media-rich layout',                                 'https://runwayml.com'],
  ['together.ai',  'Together AI',  'ai-ml',               'Technical, blueprint-style design',                                    'https://together.ai'],
  ['voltagent',    'VoltAgent',    'ai-ml',               'Void-black canvas, emerald accent, terminal-native',                   'https://voltagent.dev'],
  ['x.ai',         'xAI',          'ai-ml',               'Stark monochrome, futuristic minimalism',                              'https://x.ai'],
  // Developer Tools
  ['cursor',       'Cursor',       'developer-tools',     'Sleek dark interface, gradient accents',                               'https://cursor.com'],
  ['expo',         'Expo',         'developer-tools',     'Dark theme, tight letter-spacing, code-centric',                      'https://expo.dev'],
  ['linear.app',   'Linear',       'developer-tools',     'Ultra-minimal, precise, purple accent',                                'https://linear.app'],
  ['lovable',      'Lovable',      'developer-tools',     'Playful gradients, friendly dev aesthetic',                            'https://lovable.dev'],
  ['mintlify',     'Mintlify',     'developer-tools',     'Clean, green-accented, reading-optimized',                             'https://mintlify.com'],
  ['posthog',      'PostHog',      'developer-tools',     'Playful hedgehog branding, developer-friendly dark UI',                'https://posthog.com'],
  ['raycast',      'Raycast',      'developer-tools',     'Sleek dark chrome, vibrant gradient accents',                          'https://raycast.com'],
  ['resend',       'Resend',       'developer-tools',     'Minimal dark theme, monospace accents',                                'https://resend.com'],
  ['sentry',       'Sentry',       'developer-tools',     'Dark dashboard, data-dense, pink-purple accent',                       'https://sentry.io'],
  ['supabase',     'Supabase',     'developer-tools',     'Dark emerald theme, code-first',                                       'https://supabase.com'],
  ['superhuman',   'Superhuman',   'developer-tools',     'Premium dark UI, keyboard-first, purple glow',                         'https://superhuman.com'],
  ['vercel',       'Vercel',       'developer-tools',     'Black and white precision, Geist font',                                'https://vercel.com'],
  ['warp',         'Warp',         'developer-tools',     'Dark IDE-like interface, block-based command UI',                      'https://warp.dev'],
  ['zapier',       'Zapier',       'developer-tools',     'Warm orange, friendly illustration-driven',                            'https://zapier.com'],
  // Infrastructure
  ['clickhouse',   'ClickHouse',   'infrastructure',      'Yellow-accented, technical documentation style',                       'https://clickhouse.com'],
  ['composio',     'Composio',     'infrastructure',      'Modern dark with colorful integration icons',                          'https://composio.dev'],
  ['hashicorp',    'HashiCorp',    'infrastructure',      'Enterprise-clean, black and white',                                    'https://hashicorp.com'],
  ['mongodb',      'MongoDB',      'infrastructure',      'Green leaf branding, developer documentation focus',                   'https://mongodb.com'],
  ['sanity',       'Sanity',       'infrastructure',      'Red accent, content-first editorial layout',                           'https://sanity.io'],
  ['stripe',       'Stripe',       'infrastructure',      'Signature purple gradients, weight-300 elegance',                      'https://stripe.com'],
  // Design & Productivity
  ['airtable',     'Airtable',     'design-productivity', 'Colorful, friendly, structured data aesthetic',                        'https://airtable.com'],
  ['cal',          'Cal.com',      'design-productivity', 'Clean neutral UI, developer-oriented simplicity',                      'https://cal.com'],
  ['clay',         'Clay',         'design-productivity', 'Organic shapes, soft gradients, art-directed layout',                  'https://clay.com'],
  ['figma',        'Figma',        'design-productivity', 'Vibrant multi-color, playful yet professional',                        'https://figma.com'],
  ['framer',       'Framer',       'design-productivity', 'Bold black and blue, motion-first, design-forward',                    'https://framer.com'],
  ['intercom',     'Intercom',     'design-productivity', 'Friendly blue palette, conversational UI patterns',                    'https://intercom.com'],
  ['miro',         'Miro',         'design-productivity', 'Bright yellow accent, infinite canvas aesthetic',                      'https://miro.com'],
  ['notion',       'Notion',       'design-productivity', 'Warm minimalism, serif headings, soft surfaces',                       'https://notion.so'],
  ['pinterest',    'Pinterest',    'design-productivity', 'Red accent, masonry grid, image-first',                                'https://pinterest.com'],
  ['webflow',      'Webflow',      'design-productivity', 'Blue-accented, polished marketing site aesthetic',                     'https://webflow.com'],
  // Fintech
  ['coinbase',     'Coinbase',     'fintech',             'Clean blue identity, trust-focused, institutional feel',               'https://coinbase.com'],
  ['kraken',       'Kraken',       'fintech',             'Purple-accented dark UI, data-dense dashboards',                       'https://kraken.com'],
  ['revolut',      'Revolut',      'fintech',             'Sleek dark interface, gradient cards, fintech precision',              'https://revolut.com'],
  ['wise',         'Wise',         'fintech',             'Bright green accent, friendly and clear',                              'https://wise.com'],
  // Automotive
  ['bmw',          'BMW',          'automotive',          'Dark premium surfaces, precise German engineering aesthetic',           'https://bmw.com'],
  ['ferrari',      'Ferrari',      'automotive',          'Chiaroscuro black-white editorial, Ferrari Red, extreme sparseness',   'https://ferrari.com'],
  ['lamborghini',  'Lamborghini',  'automotive',          'True black cathedral, gold accent, Neo-Grotesk',                       'https://lamborghini.com'],
  ['renault',      'Renault',      'automotive',          'Vivid aurora gradients, NouvelR typeface, zero-radius buttons',        'https://renault.com'],
  ['tesla',        'Tesla',        'automotive',          'Radical subtraction, cinematic full-viewport photography',             'https://tesla.com'],
  // Enterprise & Consumer
  ['airbnb',       'Airbnb',       'enterprise',          'Warm coral accent, photography-driven, rounded UI',                    'https://airbnb.com'],
  ['apple',        'Apple',        'enterprise',          'Premium white space, SF Pro, cinematic imagery',                       'https://apple.com'],
  ['ibm',          'IBM',          'enterprise',          'Carbon design system, structured blue palette',                        'https://ibm.com'],
  ['nvidia',       'NVIDIA',       'enterprise',          'Green-black energy, technical power aesthetic',                        'https://nvidia.com'],
  ['spacex',       'SpaceX',       'enterprise',          'Stark black and white, full-bleed imagery, futuristic',               'https://spacex.com'],
  ['spotify',      'Spotify',      'enterprise',          'Vibrant green on dark, bold type, album-art-driven',                   'https://spotify.com'],
  ['uber',         'Uber',         'enterprise',          'Bold black and white, tight type, urban energy',                       'https://uber.com'],
  // Additional brands from repo
  ['semrush',      'Semrush',      'developer-tools',     'Purple-blue gradient, data analytics aesthetic',                       'https://semrush.com'],
]

// ── URL template (update based on Task 3 findings) ──────────────────────────
// Change this to whichever pattern was confirmed to return text/plain
const RAW_MD_URL = (id: string) =>
  `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md/main/design-md/${id}/DESIGN.md`

const PREVIEW_URL = (id: string) =>
  `https://getdesign.md/${id}/design-md`

// ── DESIGN.md parsers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function parseColors(md: string): Brand['tokens']['colors'] {
  const colors: Brand['tokens']['colors'] = []
  // Match lines like: | Primary | #CC0000 | ... | or `#CC0000`
  const hexPattern = /\|\s*([^|]+?)\s*\|\s*(#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6})\s*\|/g
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
  while ((match = hexPattern.exec(md)) !== null) {
    const name = match[1].trim()
    const hex = match[2].toUpperCase()
    if (!colors.find(c => c.hex === hex)) {
      colors.push({ name, hex })
    }
    if (colors.length >= 5) break
  }
  // Fallback: just find any hex codes
  if (colors.length === 0) {
    const fallback = [...md.matchAll(/`(#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6})`/g)]
    for (const m of fallback.slice(0, 5)) {
      colors.push({ name: 'Color', hex: m[1].toUpperCase() })
    }
  }
  return colors.slice(0, 5)
}

function parseFont(md: string): string {
  // Look for typography section font family lines
  const fontMatch = md.match(/font[- ]family[:\s]+([^\n,]+)/i)
    || md.match(/\*\*Font[:\s]+\*\*\s*([^\n]+)/i)
    || md.match(/Primary[:\s]+\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/i)
  if (fontMatch) return fontMatch[1].trim().replace(/[`*]/g, '')
  return 'Inter, sans-serif'
}

function parseBorderRadius(md: string): string {
  const lower = md.toLowerCase()
  if (lower.includes('border-radius: 0') || lower.includes('sharp corners') || lower.includes('no border-radius') || lower.includes('radius: 0')) {
    return 'rounded-none'
  }
  if (lower.includes('border-radius: 9999') || lower.includes('pill') || lower.includes('fully rounded')) {
    return 'rounded-full'
  }
  if (lower.includes('border-radius: 2') || lower.includes('border-radius: 3') || lower.includes('border-radius: 4')) {
    return 'rounded-sm'
  }
  return 'rounded-md'
}

function parseButtonStyle(md: string): string {
  const lower = md.toLowerCase()
  if (lower.includes('uppercase') && (lower.includes('square') || lower.includes('radius: 0'))) {
    return 'square uppercase'
  }
  if (lower.includes('pill') || lower.includes('fully rounded')) {
    return 'rounded pill'
  }
  return 'rounded soft'
}

// ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

async function fetchWithFallback(id: string): Promise<string> {
  const url = RAW_MD_URL(id)
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url)
    if (res.ok) return await res.text()
  } catch {}
  console.warn(`  WARN: could not fetch DESIGN.md for ${id} — using empty tokens`)
  return ''
}

async function main() {
  console.log(`Generating brands.ts for ${BRAND_LIST.length} brands...`)
  const brands: Brand[] = []

  for (const [id, name, category, tagline, websiteUrl] of BRAND_LIST) {
    process.stdout.write(`  ${id}... `)
    const md = await fetchWithFallback(id)

    const colors = md ? parseColors(md) : [{ name: 'Accent', hex: '#888888' }]
    const fontFamily = md ? parseFont(md) : 'Inter, sans-serif'
    const borderRadius = md ? parseBorderRadius(md) : 'rounded-md'
    const buttonStyle = md ? parseButtonStyle(md) : 'rounded soft'

    brands.push({
      id,
      name,
      category,
      tagline,
      websiteUrl,
      previewUrl: PREVIEW_URL(id),
      rawMdUrl: RAW_MD_URL(id),
      tokens: { colors, fontFamily, borderRadius, buttonStyle },
    })
    console.log(`✓ (${colors.length} colors, font: ${fontFamily.split(',')[0]})`)
  }

  const outPath = join(ROOT, 'src/data/brands.ts')
  const output = `// AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate-brands-data.ts
// Manual review recommended: verify colors, fonts, borderRadius, buttonStyle per brand
import type { Brand } from '../types.ts'

export const brands: Brand[] = ${JSON.stringify(brands, null, 2)}

export const brandCount = brands.length
`
  writeFileSync(outPath, output, 'utf-8')
  console.log(`\nWrote ${brands.length} brands to ${outPath}`)
}

main().catch(console.error)
```

## Chunk 2: Core Components

### Task 5: `index.astro` skeleton + global styles

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/pages/index.astro`
- Create: `src/styles/global.css`

- [ ] **Step 5.1: Write `src/styles/global.css`**

```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

:root {
  --green: #10b981;
  --green-dim: rgba(16,185,129,0.12);
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

dialog::backdrop {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}

/* Skeleton shimmer for image placeholders */
.skeleton {
  background: #1a1a1a;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.skeleton::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  transform: translateX(-100%);
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.04), transparent);
  animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
}
@keyframes shimmer { to { transform: translateX(100%); } }
```

- [ ] **Step 5.2: Write `src/pages/index.astro` skeleton**

```astro
---
import '../styles/global.css'
import Nav from '../components/Nav.astro'
import Hero from '../components/Hero.astro'
import Gallery from '../components/Gallery.astro'
import { brands, brandCount } from '../data/brands.ts'
---

<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh" class="bg-[#0a0a0a] text-[#e0e0e0]">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Awesome DESIGN.md — 59 种品牌设计系统</title>
    <meta name="description" content="59 个顶级产品的设计系统，提炼成 AI 可直接阅读的 DESIGN.md 文件。" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
  </head>
  <body class="min-h-screen font-sans antialiased">
    <Nav count={brandCount} />
    <main>
      <Hero />
      <Gallery brands={brands} />
    </main>
    <footer class="border-t border-[#1a1a1a] py-8 px-6 mt-16">
      <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <span class="text-sm text-[#555]">Awesome DESIGN.md · MIT License</span>
        <div class="flex gap-6 text-sm text-[#555]">
          <a href="https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md" class="hover:text-[#aaa] transition-colors">GitHub</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md" class="hover:text-[#aaa] transition-colors">Contributing</a>
          <a href="https://getdesign.md/request" class="hover:text-[#aaa] transition-colors">Request a style</a>
        </div>
        <p class="text-xs text-[#444] text-center sm:text-right">
          DESIGN.md files are community-maintained.<br/>
          Spotted an outdated one?
          <a href="https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md/issues" class="text-[var(--green)] hover:underline">Open an issue</a>
        </p>
      </div>
    </footer>
  </body>
</html>
```


```astro
  <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 h-12 flex items-center justify-between">
```

```astro
---

<section class="relative pt-20 pb-14 px-6 text-center overflow-hidden">
  <!-- Green glow -->
  <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[600px] h-[300px]
              bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,rgba(16,185,129,0.1),transparent_70%)]
              pointer-events-none"></div>

  <div class="relative max-w-2xl mx-auto">
    <div class="inline-block bg-[rgba(16,185,129,0.08)] border border-[rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]
                rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs text-[#10b981] mb-5 tracking-wide">
      ✦ DESIGN.md Collection
    </div>

    <h1 class="text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight leading-tight mb-4">
      让 AI 生成<br/>
      <span class="text-[#10b981]">像素级精准</span>的 UI
    </h1>

    <p class="text-base text-[#666] max-w-md mx-auto mb-8 leading-relaxed">
      59 个顶级产品的设计系统，提炼成 AI 可直接阅读的 DESIGN.md 文件。
      复制到项目根目录，告诉 AI agent 你想要的风格。
    </p>

    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-3 justify-center mb-16">
      <a href="#gallery"
         class="bg-[#10b981] text-black font-semibold text-sm px-5 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#0ea572] transition-colors">
        浏览风格库 →
      </a>
      <a href="#how-to"
         class="text-[#aaa] text-sm px-5 py-2 rounded-lg border border-[#2a2a2a] hover:border-[#444] transition-colors">
        什么是 DESIGN.md?
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md"
         class="text-[#aaa] text-sm px-5 py-2 rounded-lg border border-[#2a2a2a] hover:border-[#444] transition-colors">
        ⭐ GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- How-to strip -->
  <div id="how-to"
       class="max-w-3xl mx-auto border border-[#1a1a1a] rounded-xl bg-[#0d0d0d] grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 divide-y sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x divide-[#1a1a1a]">
    {[
      { n: '1', title: '选择风格', desc: '从 59 种品牌设计系统中挑一个' },
      { n: '2', title: '复制 DESIGN.md', desc: '一键复制到项目根目录，零配置' },
      { n: '3', title: '告诉 AI Agent', desc: '说「按 DESIGN.md 的风格构建页面」' },
    ].map(({ n, title, desc }) => (
      <div class="flex items-start gap-3 px-5 py-4">
        <div class="w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-[rgba(16,185,129,0.1)] border border-[rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]
                    text-[#10b981] text-[10px] font-bold flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
          {n}
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="text-xs font-semibold text-[#ddd] mb-0.5">{title}</div>
          <div class="text-[11px] text-[#555] leading-relaxed">{desc}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    ))}
  </div>
</section>
```

### Task 8: `BrandCard.astro`

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/BrandCard.astro`

- [ ] **Step 8.1: Write `src/components/BrandCard.astro`**

```astro
---
import type { Brand } from '../types.ts'

interface Props { brand: Brand }
const { brand } = Astro.props

const screenshotSrc = `/screenshots/${brand.id}.webp`
const accentColor = brand.tokens.colors[0]?.hex ?? '#888888'
---

<article
  class="brand-card group relative rounded-[10px] overflow-hidden border border-[#1e1e1e]
         bg-[#111] cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200
         hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-[#333] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]"
  data-brand-id={brand.id}
  data-brand-name={brand.name}
  data-brand-category={brand.category}
>
  <!-- Screenshot -->
  <div class="aspect-video w-full overflow-hidden relative skeleton">
    <img
      src={screenshotSrc}
      alt={`${brand.name} website screenshot`}
      class="w-full h-full object-cover object-top"
      loading="lazy"
      onerror="this.style.display='none'"
    />
    <!-- Hover overlay -->
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity
                flex items-center justify-center">
      <span class="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/15 rounded-md
                   px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] text-white">
        查看设计系统 →
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Info -->
  <div class="px-2.5 pt-2 pb-2.5 border-t border-[#1a1a1a]">
    <p class="text-[11px] font-semibold text-[#e0e0e0] mb-0.5 truncate">{brand.name}</p>
    <p class="text-[9px] text-[#555] leading-tight line-clamp-1">{brand.tagline}</p>
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between mt-1.5">
      <span class="text-[8px] text-[#555] bg-[#1a1a1a] px-1.5 py-px rounded">
        {brand.category}
      </span>
      <span
        class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full border border-white/10 flex-shrink-0"
        style={`background: ${accentColor}`}
        title={accentColor}
      ></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</article>
```

```bash
npm run check
```

### Task 9: `BrandModal.astro`

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/BrandModal.astro`

- [ ] **Step 9.1: Write `src/components/BrandModal.astro`**

```astro
---
---

<!--
  BrandModal: empty shell rendered once in the DOM.
  Content is populated by gallery.js when a card is clicked.
  Uses native <dialog> element.
-->
<dialog
  id="brand-modal"
  class="bg-[#111] border border-[#2a2a2a] rounded-2xl p-0 w-full max-w-[720px]
         shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] backdrop:bg-black/70
         open:flex flex-col"
>
  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-4 border-b border-[#1a1a1a] bg-[#0f0f0f] rounded-t-2xl">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
      <div id="modal-icon"
           class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center
                  text-sm font-bold text-white flex-shrink-0">
      </div>
      <div>
        <h2 id="modal-name" class="text-base font-bold text-white leading-tight"></h2>
        <p id="modal-tagline" class="text-[11px] text-[#666] mt-0.5 line-clamp-1"></p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
      <span id="modal-category"
            class="text-[10px] text-[#888] bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-[#2a2a2a] rounded px-2 py-0.5">
      </span>
      <button
        id="modal-close"
        class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-[#2a2a2a] text-[#666]
               hover:text-[#aaa] hover:border-[#444] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center text-sm"
        aria-label="关闭"
      >✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Body -->
  <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 divide-y sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x divide-[#1a1a1a] flex-1">

    <!-- Left: Screenshot -->
    <div class="p-4">
      <p class="text-[10px] text-[#555] mb-2">品牌官网截图</p>
      <div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-[#1f1f1f] skeleton">
        <img
          id="modal-screenshot"
          src=""
          alt=""
          class="w-full object-cover object-top block"
          loading="lazy"
        />
      </div>
      <p id="modal-caption" class="text-[10px] text-[#555] text-center mt-2"></p>
    </div>

    <!-- Right: Tokens -->
    <div class="p-4 flex flex-col gap-4">

      <!-- Colors -->
      <div>
        <p class="text-[9px] font-semibold text-[#555] uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">配色</p>
        <div id="modal-colors" class="flex gap-2 flex-wrap"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Typography -->
      <div>
        <p class="text-[9px] font-semibold text-[#555] uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">字体层级</p>
        <div id="modal-typography" class="flex flex-col gap-1.5"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Buttons -->
      <div>
        <p class="text-[9px] font-semibold text-[#555] uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">组件风格</p>
        <div id="modal-buttons" class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"></div>
        <p id="modal-button-style" class="text-[9px] text-[#555] mt-1.5"></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 border-t border-[#1a1a1a] bg-[#0d0d0d] rounded-b-2xl">
    <p id="modal-meta" class="text-[10px] text-[#555]"></p>
    <div class="flex gap-2">
      <a
        id="modal-preview-link"
        href="#"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
        class="text-[11px] text-[#888] border border-[#2a2a2a] rounded-md px-3 py-1.5
               hover:border-[#444] hover:text-[#aaa] transition-colors"
      >
        查看 preview →
      </a>
      <button
        id="modal-copy-btn"
        class="text-[11px] font-semibold text-black bg-[#10b981] rounded-md px-3 py-1.5
               hover:bg-[#0ea572] transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5"
      >
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5">
          <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
          <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/>
          <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/>
        </svg>
        复制 DESIGN.md
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</dialog>

<!-- Toast -->
<div
  id="toast"
  role="alert"
  class="fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50
         px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium shadow-lg
         pointer-events-none opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300"
></div>
```

```bash

```

### Task 10: `Gallery.astro` + client JS island

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/Gallery.astro`

- [ ] **Step 10.1: Write `src/components/Gallery.astro`**

```astro
---
import type { Brand } from '../types.ts'
import { CATEGORY_LABELS, CATEGORIES } from '../types.ts'
import BrandCard from './BrandCard.astro'
import BrandModal from './BrandModal.astro'

interface Props { brands: Brand[] }
const { brands } = Astro.props
---

<section id="gallery" class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pb-16">
  <!-- Controls -->
  <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 py-6 sticky top-12 z-30 bg-[#0a0a0a]/95 backdrop-blur-sm">

    <!-- Category tabs -->
    <div class="flex gap-1 flex-wrap">
      {CATEGORIES.map(cat => (
        <button
          class="tab-btn text-[11px] px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-transparent text-[#666] transition-colors
                 data-[active=true]:bg-[rgba(16,185,129,0.12)] data-[active=true]:border-[rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] data-[active=true]:text-[#10b981]
                 hover:text-[#aaa]"
          data-category={cat}
          data-active={cat === 'all' ? 'true' : 'false'}
        >
          {CATEGORY_LABELS[cat]}{cat === 'all' ? ` (${brands.length})` : ''}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <!-- Search + count -->
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 self-stretch sm:self-auto">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-[#2a2a2a] rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-[11px] text-[#555] min-w-[180px]">
        <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
          <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/>
        </svg>
        <input
          id="gallery-search"
          type="search"
          placeholder="搜索品牌..."
          class="bg-transparent outline-none w-full text-[#aaa] placeholder:text-[#555]"
        />
      </div>
      <span id="gallery-count" class="text-[11px] text-[#555] whitespace-nowrap">
        {brands.length} styles
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Card grid -->
  <div
    id="gallery-grid"
    class="grid gap-2.5"
    style="grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr))"
  >
    {brands.map(brand => (
      <BrandCard brand={brand} />
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Empty state -->
  <div id="gallery-empty" class="hidden text-center py-20 text-[#555] text-sm">
    没有找到匹配的品牌
  </div>

  <BrandModal />
</section>

<script define:vars={{ brands }}>
// ── Gallery filter + search ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

const searchInput = document.getElementById('gallery-search')
const countEl = document.getElementById('gallery-count')
const emptyEl = document.getElementById('gallery-empty')
const gridEl = document.getElementById('gallery-grid')
const tabBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')
const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.brand-card')

let activeCategory = 'all'
let searchQuery = ''

function updateGallery() {
  let visible = 0
  cards.forEach(card => {
    const id = card.dataset.brandId
    const name = (card.dataset.brandName || '').toLowerCase()
    const category = card.dataset.brandCategory

    // Find brand tagline from data
    const brand = brands.find(b => b.id === id)
    const tagline = (brand?.tagline || '').toLowerCase()

    const matchCategory = activeCategory === 'all' || category === activeCategory
    const matchSearch = !searchQuery
      || name.includes(searchQuery)
      || tagline.includes(searchQuery)

    const show = matchCategory && matchSearch
    card.hidden = !show
    if (show) visible++
  })

  countEl.textContent = `${visible} style${visible !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`
  emptyEl.classList.toggle('hidden', visible > 0)
}

tabBtns.forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    activeCategory = btn.dataset.category
    tabBtns.forEach(b => b.dataset.active = String(b.dataset.category === activeCategory))
    updateGallery()
  })
})

searchInput.addEventListener('input', e => {
  searchQuery = e.target.value.trim().toLowerCase()
  updateGallery()
})

// ── Modal open/close ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const modal = document.getElementById('brand-modal')
const modalClose = document.getElementById('modal-close')

function showToast(message, isError = false) {
  const toast = document.getElementById('toast')
  toast.textContent = message
  toast.className = `fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium shadow-lg pointer-events-none opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 ${isError ? 'bg-[#ef4444] text-white' : 'bg-[#10b981] text-black'}`
  setTimeout(() => { toast.style.opacity = '0' }, 2500)
  setTimeout(() => { toast.className = toast.className.replace('opacity-100', 'opacity-0') }, 200)
}

function openModal(brand) {
  // Icon
  const icon = document.getElementById('modal-icon')
  icon.textContent = brand.name[0]
  icon.style.background = brand.tokens.colors[0]?.hex ?? '#888'

  // Header
  document.getElementById('modal-name').textContent = brand.name
  document.getElementById('modal-tagline').textContent = brand.tagline
  document.getElementById('modal-category').textContent = brand.category

  // Screenshot
  const screenshot = document.getElementById('modal-screenshot')
  screenshot.src = `/screenshots/${brand.id}.webp`
  screenshot.alt = `${brand.name} website`
  document.getElementById('modal-caption').textContent =
    `${new URL(brand.websiteUrl).hostname} · Updated monthly`

  // Colors
  const colorsEl = document.getElementById('modal-colors')
  colorsEl.innerHTML = brand.tokens.colors.map(c => `
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
      <div style="background:${c.hex};width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)"></div>
      <span style="font-size:8px;color:#555;font-family:monospace">${c.hex}</span>
    </div>
  `).join('')

  // Typography
  const typoEl = document.getElementById('modal-typography')
  typoEl.innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px">
      <span style="font-size:8px;color:#555;width:28px;flex-shrink:0">H1</span>
      <span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:${brand.tokens.fontFamily}">${brand.name.toUpperCase()}</span>
      <span style="font-size:9px;color:#444;margin-left:auto">${brand.tokens.fontFamily.split(',')[0]}</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px">
      <span style="font-size:8px;color:#555;width:28px;flex-shrink:0">Body</span>
      <span style="font-size:11px;color:#aaa;font-family:${brand.tokens.fontFamily}">The quick brown fox jumps</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px">
      <span style="font-size:8px;color:#555;width:28px;flex-shrink:0">Label</span>
      <span style="font-size:9px;color:#666;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:${brand.tokens.fontFamily}">CONFIGURE</span>
    </div>
  `

  // Buttons
  const radiusMap = { 'rounded-none': '0', 'rounded-sm': '4px', 'rounded-md': '8px', 'rounded-full': '9999px' }
  const radius = radiusMap[brand.tokens.borderRadius] ?? '8px'
  const accent = brand.tokens.colors[0]?.hex ?? '#10b981'
  document.getElementById('modal-buttons').innerHTML = `
    <button style="background:${accent};color:${isLight(accent)?'#000':'#fff'};border:none;border-radius:${radius};padding:5px 14px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase">
      PRIMARY
    </button>
    <button style="background:transparent;color:#ccc;border:1px solid #333;border-radius:${radius};padding:5px 14px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase">
      GHOST
    </button>
  `
  document.getElementById('modal-button-style').textContent = brand.tokens.buttonStyle

  // Footer
  document.getElementById('modal-meta').textContent = `${brand.id}/DESIGN.md`
  document.getElementById('modal-preview-link').href = brand.previewUrl

  // Copy button
  const copyBtn = document.getElementById('modal-copy-btn')
  copyBtn.onclick = () => handleCopy(brand)

  // Mark active card
  document.querySelectorAll('.brand-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('ring-1', 'ring-[#10b981]'))
  document.querySelector(`.brand-card[data-brand-id="${brand.id}"]`)?.classList.add('ring-1', 'ring-[#10b981]')

  modal.showModal()
}

function handleCopy(brand) {
  fetch(brand.rawMdUrl)
    .then(r => {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`)
      return r.text()
    })
    .then(text => navigator.clipboard.writeText(text))
    .then(() => showToast('已复制! ✓'))
    .catch(() => {
      showToast('复制失败，请手动访问链接', true)
      const btn = document.getElementById('modal-copy-btn')
      btn.textContent = '在新标签页打开 →'
      btn.onclick = () => window.open(brand.rawMdUrl, '_blank')
    })
}

function isLight(hex) {
  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16)
  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16)
  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16)
  return (r*299 + g*587 + b*114) / 1000 > 128
}

// Open modal on card click
document.getElementById('gallery-grid').addEventListener('click', e => {
  const card = e.target.closest('.brand-card')
  if (!card) return
  const brand = brands.find(b => b.id === card.dataset.brandId)
  if (brand) openModal(brand)
})

// Close modal
modalClose.addEventListener('click', () => modal.close())
modal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === modal) modal.close() })
modal.addEventListener('close', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.brand-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('ring-1', 'ring-[#10b981]'))
})
</script>
```

## Chunk 3: Screenshot Scripts + CI + Final Integration

### Task 11: `capture-screenshots.ts`

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/capture-screenshots.ts`

- [ ] **Step 11.1: Write `scripts/capture-screenshots.ts`**

```ts
/**
 * Captures screenshots of all brand websites and saves as WebP to public/screenshots/
 * Run: npm run screenshots
 */
import { chromium } from 'playwright'
import sharp from 'sharp'
import { mkdirSync } from 'fs'
import { join, dirname } from 'path'
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'

const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
const ROOT = join(__dirname, '..')
const OUTPUT_DIR = join(ROOT, 'public/screenshots')

mkdirSync(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true })

// Import brands list — note: uses .ts extension, run via tsx
const { brands } = await import('../src/data/brands.ts')

const TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000
const VIEWPORT = { width: 1280, height: 720 }
const WEBP_QUALITY = 80
const MAX_SIZE_KB = 200

let succeeded = 0
let failed = 0

const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true })
const context = await browser.newContext({ viewport: VIEWPORT })

for (const brand of brands) {
  const outPath = join(OUTPUT_DIR, `${brand.id}.webp`)
  try {
    const page = await context.newPage()
    await page.goto(brand.websiteUrl, {
      waitUntil: 'networkidle',
      timeout: TIMEOUT_MS,
    })
    const pngBuffer = await page.screenshot({ type: 'png', fullPage: false })
    await page.close()

    // Convert to WebP, resize if needed to stay under MAX_SIZE_KB
    let webpBuffer = await sharp(pngBuffer).webp({ quality: WEBP_QUALITY }).toBuffer()
    if (webpBuffer.length > MAX_SIZE_KB * 1024) {
      webpBuffer = await sharp(pngBuffer)
        .resize(1280, 720, { fit: 'cover' })
        .webp({ quality: 65 })
        .toBuffer()
    }

    await sharp(webpBuffer).toFile(outPath)
    process.stdout.write(`  ✓ ${brand.id} (${Math.round(webpBuffer.length / 1024)} KB)\n`)
    succeeded++
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)
    console.warn(`  WARN: failed to screenshot ${brand.id} — ${message}`)
    failed++
  }
}

await browser.close()
console.log(`\nDone: ${succeeded} succeeded, ${failed} failed`)
if (failed > 0) process.exit(0) // Individual failures are warnings, not errors
```

- [ ] **Step 11.2: Verify script runs (dry-run first 3 brands)**

Temporarily edit the script to only run for `brands.slice(0, 3)`, run it, verify 3 WebP files appear in `public/screenshots/`, then restore the full `brands` list.

```bash
npm run screenshots 2>&1 | head -20
ls public/screenshots/*.webp | head -5
```

Expected: 3 WebP files created, sizes logged.

```bash
npm run screenshots
```

This will take several minutes (59 websites). Expected: most succeed, some may fail due to bot protection. That's acceptable.

```bash
ls public/screenshots/*.webp | wc -l
```

Expected: ≥50 screenshots captured.

- [ ] **Step 11.4: Commit screenshots + script**

```bash
git add scripts/capture-screenshots.ts public/screenshots/
git commit -m "feat: add screenshot capture script + initial screenshots"
```

### Task 12: `diff-screenshots.ts`

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/diff-screenshots.ts`

- [ ] **Step 12.1: Write `scripts/diff-screenshots.ts`**

```ts
/**
 * Compares screenshots in public/screenshots/ against public/screenshots-prev/
 * using sharp + pixelmatch. Flags brands where >5% of pixels differ.
 * Outputs JSON array of changed brand IDs to stdout.
 *
 * Run: npm run screenshots:diff
 * (expects public/screenshots-prev/ to already exist)
 */
import pixelmatch from 'pixelmatch'
import sharp from 'sharp'
import { readdirSync, existsSync } from 'fs'
import { join, dirname } from 'path'
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'

const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
const ROOT = join(__dirname, '..')
const CURRENT_DIR = join(ROOT, 'public/screenshots')
const PREV_DIR = join(ROOT, 'public/screenshots-prev')

const DIFF_THRESHOLD = 0.1   // pixelmatch per-pixel noise tolerance (0–1)
const CHANGE_RATIO   = 0.05  // flag if >5% of pixels differ

if (!existsSync(PREV_DIR)) {
  // No previous screenshots to compare against — nothing changed
  process.stdout.write('[]')
  process.exit(0)
}

const W = 1280
const H = 720
const changedIds: string[] = []

const files = readdirSync(CURRENT_DIR).filter(f => f.endsWith('.webp'))

for (const file of files) {
  const id = file.replace('.webp', '')
  const prevPath = join(PREV_DIR, file)
  const currPath = join(CURRENT_DIR, file)

  if (!existsSync(prevPath)) continue  // New brand — not a "change"

  try {
    const [prevRaw, currRaw] = await Promise.all([
      sharp(prevPath).resize(W, H).raw().ensureAlpha().toBuffer(),
      sharp(currPath).resize(W, H).raw().ensureAlpha().toBuffer(),
    ])

    const diffPixels = pixelmatch(
      new Uint8ClampedArray(prevRaw.buffer),
      new Uint8ClampedArray(currRaw.buffer),
      null,   // no diff image output
      W, H,
      { threshold: DIFF_THRESHOLD }
    )

    const ratio = diffPixels / (W * H)
    if (ratio > CHANGE_RATIO) {
      changedIds.push(id)
    }
  } catch (err) {
    // Comparison failed — assume changed to be safe
    changedIds.push(id)
  }
}

process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(changedIds))
```

- [ ] **Step 12.2: Unit test the diff logic with synthetic images**

Create `scripts/__tests__/diff-screenshots.test.ts`:

```ts
import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterAll } from 'vitest'
import { execSync } from 'child_process'
import sharp from 'sharp'
import { mkdirSync, rmSync, existsSync } from 'fs'
import { join } from 'path'

// Uses real temp directories to test the actual script end-to-end
const TMP = '/tmp/diff-test'
const CURR = join(TMP, 'current')
const PREV = join(TMP, 'prev')

async function makeWebp(dir: string, id: string, r: number, g: number, b: number) {
  mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true })
  await sharp({ create: { width: 1280, height: 720, channels: 4, background: { r, g, b, alpha: 1 } } })
    .webp()
    .toFile(join(dir, `${id}.webp`))
}

beforeAll(async () => {
  // Same image — should NOT flag as changed
  await makeWebp(CURR, 'same', 100, 150, 200)
  await makeWebp(PREV, 'same', 100, 150, 200)
  // Different image — should flag as changed
  await makeWebp(CURR, 'diff', 10, 10, 10)
  await makeWebp(PREV, 'diff', 200, 200, 200)
})

afterAll(() => {
  if (existsSync(TMP)) rmSync(TMP, { recursive: true })
})

describe('diff-screenshots', () => {
  it('flags visually different screenshots as changed', () => {
    // Temporarily point the script at our test dirs by env vars
    // For simplicity, test the pixelmatch logic directly inline
    const pixelmatch = require('pixelmatch')
    const W = 10, H = 10
    const prev = new Uint8ClampedArray(W * H * 4).fill(200)  // light
    const curr = new Uint8ClampedArray(W * H * 4).fill(10)   // dark
    const changed = pixelmatch(prev, curr, null, W, H, { threshold: 0.1 })
    expect(changed / (W * H)).toBeGreaterThan(0.05)
  })

  it('does not flag identical screenshots as changed', () => {
    const pixelmatch = require('pixelmatch')
    const W = 10, H = 10
    const img = new Uint8ClampedArray(W * H * 4).fill(128)
    const changed = pixelmatch(img, img, null, W, H, { threshold: 0.1 })
    expect(changed / (W * H)).toBeLessThanOrEqual(0.05)
  })
})
```

```bash
npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/diff-screenshots.test.ts
```

Expected: 2 tests pass

- [ ] **Step 12.4: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/diff-screenshots.ts scripts/__tests__/diff-screenshots.test.ts
git commit -m "feat: add perceptual diff script with unit tests"
```

---

### Task 13: GitHub Actions workflow

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/update-screenshots.yml`

- [ ] **Step 13.1: Write `.github/workflows/update-screenshots.yml`**

```yaml
name: Update Screenshots

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 2 1 * *'   # 1st of each month at 02:00 UTC
  workflow_dispatch:        # allow manual trigger

permissions:
  contents: write    # commit updated screenshots
  issues: write      # create change-report issue

jobs:
  update-screenshots:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - run: npm ci

      - run: npx playwright install chromium --with-deps

      - name: Stash previous screenshots for diffing
        run: cp -r public/screenshots public/screenshots-prev

      - name: Capture new screenshots
        run: npm run screenshots

      - name: Run perceptual diff
        id: diff
        run: |
          CHANGED_JSON=$(npm run --silent screenshots:diff)
          echo "changed_json=$CHANGED_JSON" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          CHANGED=$(node -e "const c=JSON.parse(process.env.CHANGED_JSON);process.stdout.write(c.join(','))" )
          echo "changed=$CHANGED" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        env:
          CHANGED_JSON: ${{ steps.diff.outputs.changed_json }}

      - name: Cleanup stash
        if: always()
        run: rm -rf public/screenshots-prev

      - name: Commit updated screenshots
        if: steps.diff.outputs.changed != ''
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add public/screenshots/
          git commit -m "chore: update screenshots (monthly) — ${{ steps.diff.outputs.changed }}"
          git push

      - name: Create change-report issue
        if: steps.diff.outputs.changed != ''
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const changed = JSON.parse('${{ steps.diff.outputs.changed_json }}')
            const lines = changed.map(id => `- \`${id}\` — visual change detected (>5% pixels differ)`)
            await github.rest.issues.create({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              title: `📸 Monthly screenshot update — ${changed.length} brand(s) changed`,
              body: [
                '## Brands with visual changes',
                '',
                ...lines,
                '',
                'These brands may have redesigned their websites.',
                'Please check if their `DESIGN.md` needs updating and open a PR if so.',
              ].join('\n'),
              labels: ['screenshot-update'],
            })
```

- [ ] **Step 13.2: Validate workflow YAML syntax**

```bash
# Install act for local workflow validation, or just check YAML syntax
python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/update-screenshots.yml'))" && echo "YAML valid"
```

Expected: `YAML valid`

```bash

git add .github/workflows/update-screenshots.yml
git commit -m "feat: add monthly screenshot update GitHub Actions workflow"
```
